name: LIFE RPG
description:
CREATE YOUR OWN STORY: ULTIMATE EDITION

On this bot, you can do anything, play GOD!! If you want to have a normal and fun life you can, ever want to be a serial killer but don't wanna handle the repercussions or guilt? Use this bot!! Have a family, fight in a war, become the monarch, be a billionaire, the possibilities are endless! You don't even have to obey the laws of psychics!! Do anything!! ANYTHING!! Even if they aren't physically possible in the real world!

LIVE OUT ALL YOUR WILDEST FANTASIES!!

Please send feedback in the comments, as I'm always looking for ways to improve this particular bot's code!
creator: rabiesbf
